svg.title: EKS full stack architecture
svg.desc: Layered diagram showing EKS cluster with addons, Karpenter node pools, and monitoring stack

g.text: AWS Load Balancer Controller · External DNS · Cert Manager
replaces cluster-autoscaler · manages node pools dynamically

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Show me Terraform code for CPU on-demand node pool with Karpenter')
sendPrompt('Show me Terraform code for Spot node pool with Karpenter')
sendPrompt('Show me Terraform code for GPU node pool with Karpenter')

g.text: ArgoCD · deploys all above layers from Git

svg.text: Implementation order — click each to start

g.text: store state in S3 · destroy cluster · recreate in 15 mins
